Perfect! The `better-sqlite3` module has been successfully rebuilt for Electron's Node.js version (which is what Cursor uses).

**What was the problem:**
- VS Code/Cursor extensions run in Electron, not regular Node.js
- Regular `npm rebuild` uses your system's Node.js version
- Electron has its own bundled Node.js version (MODULE_VERSION 136)
- Native modules must match the Electron version

**What was fixed:**
The `electron-rebuild` command compiled `better-sqlite3` specifically for Electron's Node.js version, which matches what Cursor is using.

**Try the extension again now** - the sync should work correctly! You may need to reload the window (`Ctrl+Shift+P` → "Developer: Reload Window") for the changes to take effect.

启动扩展开发模式**\n+    - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\n+    - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\n+ \n+ 3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\n+    - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\n+    - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n+ \n+ 4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\n+    - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\n+    - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\n+ \n+ 5. **查看保存的历史**\n+    - 历史文件保存在: &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹\n+    - 文件命名格式: &#96;2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md&#96;\n+ \n+ ### 方法 2: 打包安装\n+ \n+ 如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\n+ \n+ 1. **安装打包工具**\n+    &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+    npm install -g @vscode/vsce\n+    &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ 2. **打包扩展**\n+    &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+    vsce package\n+    &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+    这会生成 &#96;cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix&#96; 文件\n+ \n+ 3. **安装 VSIX**\n+    - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 &#96;...&#96; → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\n+    - 选择生成的 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件\n+ \n+ ## 🎯 功能特性\n+ \n+ ### 自动保存\n+ - ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\n+ - ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\n+ - ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\n+ \n+ ### Markdown 格式\n+ - ✅ 清晰的对话结构\n+ - ✅ 时间戳标记\n+ - ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\n+ - ✅ 工具调用结果展示\n+ \n+ ### 文件管理\n+ - ✅ 按时间戳命名\n+ - ✅ Git 友好格式\n+ - ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\n+ \n+ ## ⚙️ 配置选项\n+ \n+ 在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json\n+ {\n+   // 启用/禁用自动保存\n+   \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n+   \n+   // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\n+   \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\n+   \n+   // 使用 UTC 时区\n+   \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n+ }\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 🔧 命令\n+ \n+ ### Save Chat History Now\n+ - **打开方式**: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; / &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96;\n+ - **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\n+ - **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\n+ \n+ ## 📝 输出示例\n+ \n+ 保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n+ &lt;!-- Generated by Chat History Extension --&gt;\n+ &lt;!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) --&gt;\n+ \n+ # 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n+ \n+ _**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n+ \n+ 帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\n+ \n+ ---\n+ \n+ _**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n+ \n+ &lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;\n+ 让我分析一下需求...\n+ &lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;\n+ \n+ ---\n+ \n+ 我来帮你实现这个插件...\n+ \n+ ---\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 🐛 故障排除\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 扩展未激活\n+ \n+ **原因**: 没有打开工作区\n+ \n+ **解决**: \n+ - 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\n+ - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 找不到数据库\n+ \n+ **原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\n+ \n+ **解决**: \n+ - 确保已安装 Cursor\n+ - 数据库位置:\n+   - Windows: &#96;%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb&#96;\n+   - macOS: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\n+   - Linux: &#96;~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\n+ \n+ **可能原因**:\n+ 1. &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;false&#96;\n+ 2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\n+ 3. 工作区未打开\n+ \n+ **解决**:\n+ 1. 检查设置: &#96;\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true&#96;\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\n+ 3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n+ 4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\n+ \n+ **原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\n+ \n+ **解决**: \n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n+ - 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\n+ - 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\n+ \n+ ## 📊 日志查看\n+ \n+ 1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（&#96;Ctrl+Shift+U&#96;）\n+ 2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\n+ 3. 查看扩展的日志输出\n+ \n+ 典型日志:\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ Cursor Chat History Extension activated\n+ Database watcher started\n+ Found 5 composers\n+ Saved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 🔄 更新代码后\n+ \n+ 如果修改了扩展代码：\n+ \n+ 1. **重新编译**:\n+    &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+    npm run compile\n+    &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ 2. **重新加载扩展**:\n+    - 在开发窗口中按 &#96;Ctrl+R&#96; / &#96;Cmd+R&#96;\n+    - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\n+ \n+ ## 🌟 高级用法\n+ \n+ ### 自定义输出目录\n+ \n+ 可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json\n+ {\n+   \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\n+ }\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ### 禁用自动保存\n+ \n+ 如果只想手动保存：\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json\n+ {\n+   \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\n+ }\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ 然后通过命令手动触发保存。\n+ \n+ ### Git 集成\n+ \n+ 建议将历史文件加入 Git:\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ # .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\n+ # 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\n+ \n+ git add .cursor-history/\n+ git commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 📚 技术细节\n+ \n+ ### 数据库读取\n+ - 使用 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 只读模式\n+ - WAL 模式确保并发访问\n+ - 自动重试机制\n+ \n+ ### 文件监听\n+ - 使用 &#96;chokidar&#96; 监听数据库变化\n+ - 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\n+ - 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\n+ \n+ ### 文件命名\n+ - UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\n+ - 标题自动清理特殊字符\n+ - 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\n+ \n+ ## 🎉 开始使用\n+ \n+ 现在你可以：\n+ \n+ 1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\n+ 2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\n+ 3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\n+ 4. **查看 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹**\n+ \n+ 祝使用愉快！ 🚀\n+ \n+ ---\n+ \n+ # Quick Start Guide\n+ \n+ ## 快速开始指南\n+ \n+ ### 1. 安装依赖\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ npm install\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ### 2. 编译项目\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ npm run compile\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ### 3. 开发模式\n+ \n+ 在 VS Code 中按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式。\n+ \n+ ### 4. 测试扩展\n+ \n+ 1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\n+ 3. 检查工作区根目录的 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹\n+ 4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\n+ \n+ ### 5. 手动触发保存\n+ \n+ - 打开命令面板: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; (Windows/Linux) 或 &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96; (macOS)\n+ - 运行命令: &#96;Save Chat History Now&#96;\n+ \n+ ### 6. 配置扩展\n+ \n+ 在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json\n+ {\n+   \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n+   \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\n+   \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n+ }\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 项目结构\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ llm_chat_history/\n+ ├── src/                            # 源代码目录\n+ │   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\n+ │   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\n+ │   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\n+ │   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\n+ │   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\n+ │   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\n+ │   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\n+ ├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\n+ ├── package.json                    # 项目配置\n+ ├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\n+ ├── README.md                       # 项目说明\n+ └── LICENSE                         # 许可证\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 故障排除\n+ \n+ ### 问题：扩展没有启动\n+ \n+ - 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\n+ - 检查数据库文件是否存在\n+ \n+ ### 问题：没有生成历史文件\n+ \n+ - 确认 &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;true&#96;\n+ - 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\n+ - 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n+ \n+ ### 问题：数据库锁定错误\n+ \n+ - 关闭 Cursor 后重试\n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n+ \n+ ### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\n+ \n+ **Windows 用户常见问题**：&#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\n+ \n+ **解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ npm run setup\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ 此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\n+ \n+ **解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\n+ \n+ 如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\n+ \n+ 1. 首先尝试更新 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 到最新版本：\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ npm install better-sqlite3@latest\n+ npm run setup\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ 2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ cd node_modules/better-sqlite3\n+ # Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\n+ npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ **解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\n+ \n+ 如果没有预编译二进制可用：\n+ 1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\n+ 2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\n+ 3. 运行：\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ npm install -g node-gyp\n+ npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 打包发布\n+ \n+ 构建 VSIX 包:\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n+ npm install -g @vscode/vsce\n+ vsce package\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ 这将生成 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\n+ \n+ ## 开发技巧\n+ \n+ 1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\n+ 2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\n+ 3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\n+ \n+ ## 下一步\n+ \n+ - 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\n+ - 添加导出功能\n+ - 集成更多配置选项\n+ - 优化性能和缓存策略\n+ \n+ ## 技术架构\n+ \n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ Cursor Database (SQLite)\n+          ↓\n+ DatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\n+          ↓\n+ DatabaseReader (读取数据)\n+          ↓\n+ ConversationBuilder (构建对话)\n+          ↓\n+ MarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\n+          ↓\n+ HistorySaver (保存文件)\n+ &#96;&#96;&#96;\n+ \n+ ## 相关资源\n+ \n+ - [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\n+ - [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\n+ - [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\n+ ",

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Combined Guide\r\n\r\n## Contents\r\n- FIX_SUMMARY.md\r\n- INSTALL_NOTES.md\r\n- INSTALL.md\r\n- QUICK_START.md\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Fix Summary: NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mismatch Issue\r\n\r\n## Problem\r\n\r\nThe extension failed to load &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; with the error:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nError: The module was compiled against a different Node.js version using\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 128. This version of Node.js requires\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Root Cause\r\n\r\n- Cursor uses **Electron 37-39** which requires **NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136**\r\n- The installed &#96;better-sqlite3@11.10.0&#96; only had prebuilt binaries up to Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n- The binary needed to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor\r\n\r\n## Solution\r\n\r\n### 1. Updated better-sqlite3 to Latest Version\r\n\r\n**Changed**: &#96;package.json&#96;\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n\"dependencies\": {\r\n  \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.5.0\",  // was ^11.0.0\r\n  \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\nThe newer version (12.5.0) includes prebuilt binaries for Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136).\r\n\r\n### 2. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: &#96;setup-sqlite.js&#96;\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- &#96;QUICK_START.md&#96;: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- &#96;README.md&#96;: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- &#96;INSTALL_NOTES.md&#96;: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ &#96;npm install&#96; - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary  \r\n✅ &#96;npm run setup&#96; - Manually runs setup script successfully  \r\n✅ &#96;npm run compile&#96; - TypeScript compilation successful  \r\n✅ Binary installed at: &#96;node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node&#96;\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   - Installs dependencies including &#96;better-sqlite3@12.5.0&#96;\r\n   - &#96;postinstall&#96; script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using &#96;npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source&#96;\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1. Press **F5** to launch the extension in development mode\r\n2. Open a workspace in the development window\r\n3. Have some conversations with Cursor AI\r\n4. Check &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run &#96;npm run setup&#96; anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ &#96;package.json&#96; - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ &#96;QUICK_START.md&#96; - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ &#96;README.md&#96; - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ &#96;setup-sqlite.js&#96; - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ &#96;INSTALL_NOTES.md&#96; - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ &#96;FIX_SUMMARY.md&#96; - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses &#96;better-sqlite3&#96;, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running &#96;npm install&#96;, the &#96;postinstall&#96; script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: &#96;npm install -g node-gyp&#96;\r\n4. Run: &#96;npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source&#96;\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nxcode-select --install\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nsudo apt-get install build-essential\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Version History\r\n\r\n- **2025-12-23**: Updated to better-sqlite3 v12.5.0 to support Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- Initial version used better-sqlite3 v11.0.0\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# 安装和使用指南\r\n\r\n## ✅ 安装完成！\r\n\r\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\r\n\r\n## 📖 使用方法\r\n\r\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\r\n\r\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\r\n   \r\n2. **按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式**\r\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\r\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n   - 历史文件保存在: &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: &#96;2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md&#96;\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   这会生成 &#96;cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix&#96; 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 &#96;...&#96; → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; / &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96;\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\r\n&lt;!-- Generated by Chat History Extension --&gt;\r\n&lt;!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) --&gt;\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: &#96;%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb&#96;\r\n  - macOS: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n  - Linux: &#96;~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;false&#96;\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: &#96;\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true&#96;\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（&#96;Ctrl+Shift+U&#96;）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 &#96;Ctrl+R&#96; / &#96;Cmd+R&#96;\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .cursor-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 &#96;chokidar&#96; 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Quick Start Guide\r\n\r\n## 快速开始指南\r\n\r\n### 1. 安装依赖\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 2. 编译项目\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run compile\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 3. 开发模式\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 中按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式。\r\n\r\n### 4. 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; (Windows/Linux) 或 &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96; (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: &#96;Save Chat History Now&#96;\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\r\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\r\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\r\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\r\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\r\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\r\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\r\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\r\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\r\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\r\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\r\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;true&#96;\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n\r\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n\r\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\r\n\r\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：&#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 到最新版本：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install better-sqlite3@latest\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ncd node_modules/better-sqlite3\r\n# Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\r\nnpx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n这将生成 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\r\n- [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\r\n- [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "import { ComposerData, Bubble } from './types';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * WorkspaceFilter filters composers so we only export chats\r\n * that belong to the currently open workspace.\r\n */\r\nexport class WorkspaceFilter {\r\n    private currentWorkspacePath: string;\r\n\r\n    constructor(workspacePath: string) {\r\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(workspacePath || '');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Returns true if the composer belongs to the current workspace.\r\n     */\r\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\r\n    ): boolean {\r\n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\r\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, [firstBubbleId]);\r\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const bubble = bubbles[0] as Bubble &amp; { workspaceProjectDir?: string };\r\n\r\n        // Prefer workspaceUris when available\r\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris &amp;&amp; bubble.workspaceUris.length &gt; 0) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace &amp;&amp; this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir\r\n        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace &amp;&amp; this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Convert a file:// URI to a filesystem path.\r\n     */\r\n    private uriToPath(uri: string): string {\r\n        try {\r\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\r\n            let fsPath = decoded.replace(/^file:\\/\\/\\//, '');\r\n\r\n            // Windows drive letters are URL encoded (e.g., d%3A)\r\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            return this.normalizePath(fsPath);\r\n        } catch {\r\n            return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Normalize paths for reliable comparison.\r\n     */\r\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\r\n        if (!filepath) return '';\r\n\r\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n\r\n        if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n            normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // remove trailing slash\r\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\r\n\r\n        return normalized;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private pathsMatch(path1: string, path2: string): boolean {\r\n        return this.normalizePath(path1) === this.normalizePath(path2);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n"

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 数据库监听器\r\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './conversation-builder';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\r\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\r\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './workspace-filter';\r\n\r\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\r\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () =&gt; {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() =&gt; {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Database watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() =&gt; {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync &lt; 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        this.performSync().catch(error =&gt; {\r\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行同步\r\n     */\r\n    private async performSync(): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\r\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n            \r\n            console.log(&#96;Found ${composers.length} composers&#96;);\r\n            \r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\r\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n                    composer,\r\n                    reader\r\n                );\r\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\r\n                    continue;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h =&gt; h.bubbleId);\r\n                \r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n                \r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder();\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n                \r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator();\r\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n                const outputDir = config.get&lt;string&gt;('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\r\n                \r\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n            }\r\n        } finally {\r\n            reader.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 扩展主入口文件\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\r\nimport { DatabaseWatcher } from './database-watcher';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展激活时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension activated');\r\n    \r\n    // 获取配置\r\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n    const autoSave = config.get&lt;boolean&gt;('autoSave', true);\r\n    \r\n    if (!autoSave) {\r\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 获取数据库路径\r\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\r\n    \r\n    // 检查数据库是否存在\r\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\r\n        console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\r\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\r\n            'Cursor database not found. Make sure you are using Cursor IDE.'\r\n        );\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\r\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\r\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\r\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 启动监听\r\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath, workspaceRoot);\r\n    watcher.start();\r\n    \r\n    // 注册命令：手动保存\r\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\r\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\r\n        () =&gt; {\r\n            watcher.syncNow();\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Chat history saved');\r\n        }\r\n    );\r\n    \r\n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\r\n        dispose: () =&gt; watcher.stop()\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension ready');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展停用时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function deactivate() {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension deactivated');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\r\n */\r\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n    \r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Linux\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}

  "resultForModel": "Success. Updated the following files:\nM src/history-saver.ts",
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 历史记录保存器\r\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class HistorySaver {\r\n    private historyDir: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history') {\r\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存对话到文件\r\n     */\r\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise&lt;string&gt; {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\r\n        \r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n        \r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            console.log(&#96;Saved: ${filename}&#96;);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return filepath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件名\r\n     */\r\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = &#96;${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z&#96;;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;${timestamp}-${title}.md&#96;;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\r\n     */\r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        // 移除特殊字符\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[&lt;&gt;:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查是否需要保存\r\n     */\r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; {\r\n        try {\r\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\r\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\r\n        } catch {\r\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Cursor Chat History\r\n\r\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files.\r\n\r\n## Features\r\n\r\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\r\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\r\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\r\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\r\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\r\n\r\n## Installation\r\n\r\n### From Source\r\n\r\n1. Clone this repository\r\n2. Run &#96;npm install&#96; to install dependencies\r\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\r\n   - If you encounter issues, run &#96;npm run setup&#96; manually\r\n3. Run &#96;npm run compile&#96; to build the extension\r\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\r\n\r\n&gt; **Note**: This extension uses &#96;better-sqlite3&#96;, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\r\n\r\n### From VSIX\r\n\r\n1. Download the &#96;.vsix&#96; file from releases\r\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\r\n3. Click the &#96;...&#96; menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\r\n4. Select the downloaded file\r\n\r\n## Usage\r\n\r\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Saving\r\n\r\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to &#96;.llm-chat-history/&#96; in your workspace root.\r\n\r\n### Manual Save\r\n\r\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\r\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\r\n2. Running the command: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n\r\n## Configuration\r\n\r\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### Settings\r\n\r\n- &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; (default: &#96;true&#96;): Enable automatic saving of chat history\r\n- &#96;chatHistory.outputDirectory&#96; (default: &#96;.llm-chat-history&#96;): Directory to save history files\r\n- &#96;chatHistory.useUTC&#96; (default: &#96;true&#96;): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\r\n\r\n## Output Format\r\n\r\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\r\n&lt;!-- Generated by Chat History Extension --&gt;\r\n&lt;!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) --&gt;\r\n\r\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\nUser's question here\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;\r\nAI's thinking process (if available)\r\n&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\nAI's response here\r\n\r\n---\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### File Naming\r\n\r\nFiles are named with the pattern: &#96;YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md&#96;\r\n\r\nExample: &#96;2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md&#96;\r\n\r\n## Requirements\r\n\r\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\r\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\r\n\r\n## Database Location\r\n\r\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\r\n\r\n- **Windows**: &#96;%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb&#96;\r\n- **macOS**: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n- **Linux**: &#96;~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n\r\n## Known Issues\r\n\r\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\r\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\r\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\r\n\r\n## Contributing\r\n\r\nContributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.\r\n\r\n## License\r\n\r\nMIT License - see LICENSE file for details\r\n\r\n## Support\r\n\r\nIf you encounter any issues, please file them in the GitHub repository.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}

Open a workspace in the development window');\r\n    console.log('3. Have conversations in Cursor');\r\nconsole.log('4. Check .llm-chat-history/ for saved conversations');\r\n} else {\r\n    console.log('❌ Some checks failed. Please fix the issues above.');\r\n    console.log('\\nQuick fixes:');\r\n    console.log('- Run: npm install');\r\n    console.log('- Run: npm run setup');\r\n    console.log('- Run: npm run compile');\r\n}\r\n\r\nconsole.log('='.repeat(60));\r\n\r\nprocess.exit(allPassed ? 0 : 1);\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Combined Guide\r\n\r\n## Contents\r\n- FIX_SUMMARY.md\r\n- INSTALL_NOTES.md\r\n- INSTALL.md\r\n- QUICK_START.md\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Fix Summary: NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mismatch Issue\r\n\r\n## Problem\r\n\r\nThe extension failed to load &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; with the error:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nError: The module was compiled against a different Node.js version using\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 128. This version of Node.js requires\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Root Cause\r\n\r\n- Cursor uses **Electron 37-39** which requires **NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136**\r\n- The installed &#96;better-sqlite3@11.10.0&#96; only had prebuilt binaries up to Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n- The binary needed to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor\r\n\r\n## Solution\r\n\r\n### 1. Updated better-sqlite3 to Latest Version\r\n\r\n**Changed**: &#96;package.json&#96;\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n\"dependencies\": {\r\n  \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.5.0\",  // was ^11.0.0\r\n  \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\nThe newer version (12.5.0) includes prebuilt binaries for Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136).\r\n\r\n### 2. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: &#96;setup-sqlite.js&#96;\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- &#96;QUICK_START.md&#96;: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- &#96;README.md&#96;: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- &#96;INSTALL_NOTES.md&#96;: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ &#96;npm install&#96; - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary  \r\n✅ &#96;npm run setup&#96; - Manually runs setup script successfully  \r\n✅ &#96;npm run compile&#96; - TypeScript compilation successful  \r\n✅ Binary installed at: &#96;node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node&#96;\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   - Installs dependencies including &#96;better-sqlite3@12.5.0&#96;\r\n   - &#96;postinstall&#96; script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using &#96;npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source&#96;\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1. Press **F5** to launch the extension in development mode\r\n2. Open a workspace in the development window\r\n3. Have some conversations with Cursor AI\r\n4. Check &#96;.llm-chat-history/&#96; folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run &#96;npm run setup&#96; anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ &#96;package.json&#96; - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ &#96;QUICK_START.md&#96; - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ &#96;README.md&#96; - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ &#96;setup-sqlite.js&#96; - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ &#96;INSTALL_NOTES.md&#96; - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ &#96;FIX_SUMMARY.md&#96; - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses &#96;better-sqlite3&#96;, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running &#96;npm install&#96;, the &#96;postinstall&#96; script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: &#96;npm install -g node-gyp&#96;\r\n4. Run: &#96;npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source&#96;\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nxcode-select --install\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nsudo apt-get install build-essential\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Version History\r\n\r\n- **2025-12-23**: Updated to better-sqlite3 v12.5.0 to support Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- Initial version used better-sqlite3 v11.0.0\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# 安装和使用指南\r\n\r\n## ✅ 安装完成！\r\n\r\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\r\n\r\n## 📖 使用方法\r\n\r\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\r\n\r\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\r\n   \r\n2. **按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式**\r\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\r\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n- 历史文件保存在: &#96;.llm-chat-history/&#96; 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: &#96;2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md&#96;\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   这会生成 &#96;cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix&#96; 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 &#96;...&#96; → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; / &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96;\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\r\n&lt;!-- Generated by Chat History Extension --&gt;\r\n&lt;!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) --&gt;\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: &#96;%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb&#96;\r\n  - macOS: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n  - Linux: &#96;~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;false&#96;\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: &#96;\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true&#96;\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（&#96;Ctrl+Shift+U&#96;）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 &#96;Ctrl+R&#96; / &#96;Cmd+R&#96;\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .cursor-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 &#96;chokidar&#96; 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Quick Start Guide\r\n\r\n## 快速开始指南\r\n\r\n### 1. 安装依赖\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 2. 编译项目\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run compile\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 3. 开发模式\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 中按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式。\r\n\r\n### 4. 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; (Windows/Linux) 或 &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96; (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: &#96;Save Chat History Now&#96;\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\r\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\r\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\r\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\r\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\r\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\r\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\r\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\r\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\r\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\r\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\r\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;true&#96;\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n\r\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n\r\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\r\n\r\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：&#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 到最新版本：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install better-sqlite3@latest\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ncd node_modules/better-sqlite3\r\n# Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\r\nnpx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n这将生成 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\r\n- [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\r\n- [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Combined Guide\r\n\r\n## Contents\r\n- FIX_SUMMARY.md\r\n- INSTALL_NOTES.md\r\n- INSTALL.md\r\n- QUICK_START.md\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Fix Summary: NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mismatch Issue\r\n\r\n## Problem\r\n\r\nThe extension failed to load &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; with the error:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nError: The module was compiled against a different Node.js version using\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 128. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: &#96;setup-sqlite.js&#96;\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- &#96;QUICK_START.md&#96;: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- &#96;README.md&#96;: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- &#96;INSTALL_NOTES.md&#96;: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ &#96;npm install&#96; - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary  \r\n✅ &#96;npm run setup&#96; - Manually runs setup script successfully  \r\n✅ &#96;npm run compile&#96; - TypeScript compilation successful  \r\n✅ Binary installed at: &#96;node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node&#96;\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   - Installs dependencies including &#96;better-sqlite3@12.5.0&#96;\r\n   - &#96;postinstall&#96; script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using &#96;npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source&#96;\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1. Press **F5** to launch the extension in development mode\r\n2. Open a workspace in the development window\r\n3. Have some conversations with Cursor AI\r\n4. Check &#96;.llm-chat-history/&#96; folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run &#96;npm run setup&#96; anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ &#96;package.json&#96; - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ &#96;QUICK_START.md&#96; - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ &#96;README.md&#96; - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ &#96;setup-sqlite.js&#96; - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ &#96;INSTALL_NOTES.md&#96; - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ &#96;FIX_SUMMARY.md&#96; - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses &#96;better-sqlite3&#96;, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running &#96;npm install&#96;, the &#96;postinstall&#96; script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: &#96;npm install -g node-gyp&#96;\r\n4. Run: &#96;npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source&#96;\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nxcode-select --install\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nsudo apt-get install build-essential\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Version History\r\n\r\n- **2025-12-23**: Updated to better-sqlite3 v12.5.0 to support Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- Initial version used better-sqlite3 v11.0.0\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# 安装和使用指南\r\n\r\n## ✅ 安装完成！\r\n\r\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\r\n\r\n## 📖 使用方法\r\n\r\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\r\n\r\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\r\n   \r\n2. **按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式**\r\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\r\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n- 历史文件保存在: &#96;.llm-chat-history/&#96; 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: &#96;2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md&#96;\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   这会生成 &#96;cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix&#96; 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 &#96;...&#96; → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; / &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96;\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\r\n&lt;!-- Generated by Chat History Extension --&gt;\r\n&lt;!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) --&gt;\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: &#96;%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb&#96;\r\n  - macOS: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n  - Linux: &#96;~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;false&#96;\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: &#96;\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true&#96;\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（&#96;Ctrl+Shift+U&#96;）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 &#96;Ctrl+R&#96; / &#96;Cmd+R&#96;\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .llm-chat-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .llm-chat-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 &#96;chokidar&#96; 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Quick Start Guide\r\n\r\n## 快速开始指南\r\n\r\n### 1. 安装依赖\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 2. 编译项目\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run compile\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 3. 开发模式\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 中按 &#96;F5&#96; 启动扩展开发模式。\r\n\r\n### 4. 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 &#96;.cursor-history/&#96; 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; (Windows/Linux) 或 &#96;Cmd+Shift+P&#96; (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: &#96;Save Chat History Now&#96;\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\r\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\r\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\r\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\r\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\r\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\r\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\r\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\r\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\r\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\r\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\r\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 &#96;chatHistory.autoSave&#96; 设置为 &#96;true&#96;\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n\r\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n\r\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\r\n\r\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：&#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 &#96;better-sqlite3&#96; 到最新版本：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install better-sqlite3@latest\r\nnpm run setup\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ncd node_modules/better-sqlite3\r\n# Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\r\nnpx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n这将生成 &#96;.vsix&#96; 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\r\n- [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\r\n- [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\r\n\r\n"
}
